raw_text:
Aisha: Hi Sandra, David — great to have the CFO on the call today. I wanted to follow up on the security questionnaire we sent over last week.

David: Yes, our security team reviewed it. Everything checked out. We're comfortable moving to proposal stage.

Sandra: One thing I should mention — we've just completed our rebrand. We're no longer TechNova Systems. We're now TechNova International. The legal entity name has changed and any contracts need to reflect that.

Aisha: Got it, thank you Sandra. I'll update our records to TechNova International.

David: On the commercial side, we reviewed your pricing deck. For 400 users, the figure we saw was around £165,000 annually. That's within our approved limit if we can include the implementation support.

Aisha: Yes, £165,000 all-in including implementation for the first year is what we can do.

David: That works. Can you get the formal proposal over this week? We need it by June 20th to get into our procurement review cycle.

Aisha: Absolutely. I'll have it with you by tomorrow. Do you anticipate any procurement blockers?

Sandra: No — David has sign-off authority. Once legal reviews the data residency clauses we should be good to proceed.

Aisha: Perfect. I'll note the EU/UK data residency requirement in the contract and flag it to our infrastructure team today.
